hooks.prompt: A git commit was just made in this repository. Read .claude/agents/knowledge-keeper.md for your role and process, then follow it: review the latest commit (e.g. `git show HEAD`) and update REQUIREMENTS.md and/or KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md if the app's actual behavior changed. Do not commit, push, or edit any files other than those two docs. If nothing behavior-relevant changed, make no edits and say so briefly.
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if the knowledge base needs updating...
